name: Rim Seals
blurb: Primary and secondary seals for external and internal floating-roof tanks. Vapour containment that meets API 650 Appendix H.

name: Primary Seals
blurb: Liquid- and vapour-mounted primary seals that ride directly against the shell.

name: Mechanical Shoe
blurb: Spring- or pantograph-mounted metal shoe seals for external floating roofs.

name: Secondary Seals
blurb: Wiper and compression secondary seals mounted above the primary to cut wind and evaporative loss.

name: Flame Arrestors
blurb: End-of-line and in-line deflagration and detonation arrestors for vents, drains and vapour-recovery lines.

name: End-of-Line
blurb: Deflagration arrestors for atmospheric tank vents and PV-valve inlets.

name: In-Line
blurb: Detonation arrestors for vapour-recovery and manifold piping.

name: Pressure / Vacuum Valves
blurb: Pressure-vacuum relief vents that protect tank shells while cutting breathing losses and emissions.

name: Hoses & Assemblies
blurb: Composite and PTFE-lined transfer hoses, loading-arm assemblies and couplings rated for hydrocarbons and chemicals.

name: Gaskets & Sealing
blurb: Spiral-wound, kammprofile and sheet gaskets for flanges, manways and shell connections.
